blended.narrative: Ski Granby Ranch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 41.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 8" over the past week. Current depth: 44".
